title: MOH advisory on dengue situation
content: The Ministry of Health advises the public to take precautions against dengue. There is no nationwide lockdown or emergency restriction related to dengue.

title: SFA food safety alert on imported products
content: The Singapore Food Agency issues food safety alerts when a specific product is recalled. Consumers should refer to official SFA announcements for confirmed recalls.

title: Police advisory on phishing and WhatsApp scams
content: The Singapore Police Force advises the public to verify suspicious messages and avoid clicking unknown links. Scam warnings are published through official advisories.

title: Gov.sg guidance on misinformation
content: Members of the public should rely on official government channels for accurate updates, especially during uncertainty.
